member.name: M:CarparkInfo.Api.Controllers.BatchController.Import(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Imports carpark data from a CSV file. Atomically replaces all existing carpark records. If any row in the file is invalid, the entire import is rolled back.
member.param: The CSV file to import (must match the HDB carpark information format).

member.name: M:CarparkInfo.Api.Controllers.CarParksController.GetAll(System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Nullable{System.Decimal})
member.summary: Returns a list of carparks, optionally filtered by free parking, night parking, and vehicle height.
member.param: Set to true to return only carparks that offer free parking.
Set to true to return only carparks that allow night parking.
Return only carparks whose gantry height is greater than or equal to this value (in metres).

member.name: M:CarparkInfo.Api.Controllers.CarParksController.GetById(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the details of a single carpark by its carpark number.

member.name: M:CarparkInfo.Api.Controllers.FavouritesController.GetFavourites(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns all carparks saved as favourites by the specified user.
member.param: The unique identifier of the user.

member.name: M:CarparkInfo.Api.Controllers.FavouritesController.AddFavourite(System.Guid,CarparkInfo.Api.Dtos.AddFavouriteRequest)
member.summary: Adds a carpark to the specified user's favourites list.
member.param: The unique identifier of the user.
Request body containing the carpark number to favourite.

member.name: M:CarparkInfo.Api.Controllers.FavouritesController.RemoveFavourite(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Removes a carpark from the specified user's favourites list.
member.param: The unique identifier of the user.
